label: Gravship facility comp
description: Comp properties for a gravship facility building. Identifies which gravship component type this building counts as and whether it provides fuel.

providesFuel.label: Provides fuel
providesFuel.description: Whether this building provides fuel to the gravship.

fuelSavingsPercent.label: Fuel savings percent
fuelSavingsPercent.description: Fraction of fuel consumption saved per launch when this facility is active (0.0 to 1.0).

componentTypeDef.label: Component type def
componentTypeDef.description: The GravshipComponentTypeDef this building counts as. Used to determine whether the gravship has all required component types installed for launch.

onlyRequiresLooseConnection.label: Only requires loose connection
onlyRequiresLooseConnection.description: Whether this facility only requires a loose connection to the gravship substructure rather than a strict adjacency link.
